name: CCK-8 Cell Proliferation / Viability Assay
nameCn: CCK-8 细胞增殖/活力检测

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 96-well plate (100 µL complete medium per well)

note.en: 2,000–10,000 cells/well depending on cell type and assay duration. Add PBS to outer wells. Incubate 24 h before treatment.
note.zh: 2,000–10,000 细胞/孔，根据细胞类型和实验时长决定。外围孔加 PBS。培养 24 h 后再处理。

note.en: 3–6 replicates. Untreated control (6 wells). Medium blank (3 wells, no cells). DMSO ≤0.1% final.
note.zh: 3–6 复孔。未处理对照 6 孔。培养基空白 3 孔（无细胞）。DMSO ≤0.1%。

components.name: 3. Add 10 µL CCK-8 reagent directly per well (do not remove medium)

note.en: CCK-8 is added directly to culture medium — no medium change required. Mix gently by pipetting up/down 3×. Avoid bubbles. Protect from direct light.
note.zh: 直接向培养液中加入——无需换液。轻柔吸打 3 次混匀。避免气泡。避光。

components.name: 4. Incubate 1–4 h at 37°C; check color development every 30 min after 1 h

note.en: Color shifts from orange to deep orange (or dark brown at high cell density). Stop when untreated wells show A450 of ~1.0–1.5. DO NOT over-incubate (background increases).
note.zh: 颜色从橙色变为深橙（高密度时棕色）。未处理孔 A450 达 ~1.0–1.5 时终止。勿过度孵育（背景升高）。

components.name: 5. Read absorbance at 450 nm (reference: 650 nm) on plate reader

note.en: Reference wavelength 630–690 nm corrects plate and medium background. Read within 30 min (WST-8 formazan is stable but phenol red continues absorbing).
note.zh: 参考波长 630–690 nm 校正培养板和培养基背景。30 min 内读完（WST-8 甲臜稳定但酚红持续吸光）。

components.name: 6. Calculate: % Viability = (A450_treated − A650_treated − blank) / (A450_ctrl − A650_ctrl − blank) × 100

note.en: IC₅₀: 4-PL logistic curve fit (GraphPad Prism). For proliferation index: normalize each timepoint to T=0.
note.zh: IC₅₀：GraphPad Prism 四参数 logistic 拟合。增殖指数：各时间点归一化至 T=0。

components.name: 7. Optional kinetic: read at multiple timepoints (T=0, 24, 48, 72 h) — same plate

note.en: Return plate to incubator after each read. CCK-8 is non-toxic — cells remain viable. Generates growth curves in real-time on same plate.
note.zh: 每次读数后将培养板放回培养箱。CCK-8 无细胞毒性——细胞保持存活。可在同一培养板上实时生成生长曲线。

notes.en: CCK-8 uses WST-8 (a tetrazolium dye, water-soluble formazan product = no DMSO needed). More sensitive and less toxic than MTT. Interference: reducing agents (DTT, β-ME, TCEP) directly reduce WST-8 (false high); colored compounds at 450 nm. Cannot re-measure after full reduction. Alternative: resazurin_assay (even less toxic, fluorescence-based).
notes.zh: CCK-8 使用 WST-8（四唑盐染料，甲臜产物水溶，无需 DMSO）。比 MTT 更灵敏、毒性更低。干扰：还原剂（DTT、β-ME、TCEP）直接还原 WST-8（假阳性高）；450 nm 处有色化合物干扰。完全还原后无法重复读数。替代方案：resazurin_assay（毒性更低，荧光法）。

ref: Ishiyama et al. (1997) Talanta 44:1299–1305; Dojindo CCK-8 Technical Manual; van Meerloo et al. (2011) Methods Mol Biol 731:237–245
